sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105184" key="*tripto/lemos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τριπτόλεμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n105184.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Triptolemus,</tr_> an Eleusinian, who spread the worship of Demeter, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:153" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">153</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
